zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet De Keith於1418年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔時，她的父親Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland29歲，母親Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow23歲。她和David Berkeley至少有1個兒子。她去世於1491年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet De Keith于1418年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔时，她的父亲Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland29岁，母亲Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow23岁。她和David Berkeley至少有1个儿子。她去世于1491年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet De Keith was born in 1418, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 29 and her mother, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, was 23. She had at least 1 son with David Berkeley. She died in 1491, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet De Keith est née en 1418, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec David Berkeley. Elle est décédée en 1491, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet De Keith 1418 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 29 und ihre Mutter Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow 23. Sie hatte mit David Berkeley mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1491 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet De Keith è nata il nel 1418 nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con David Berkeley. Morì nel 1491, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet De Keithが1418年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは29歳，母Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzowは23歳であった。彼女はDavid Berkeleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1491年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet De Keith(이)가 1418년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 David Berkeley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet De Keith nasceu em 1418, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com David Berkeley. Ela faleceu em 1491, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet De Keith родилась в 1418 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от David Berkeley. Она умерла в 1491 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet De Keith nació en 1418, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con David Berkeley. Murió en 1491, a la edad de 73 años.
